title: Preserving Our Famous Sign - Pike Place Market
content: # Preserving Our Famous Sign. ## Our Iconic Sign is Getting a New Paint Job! Don’t worry our famous Public Market Center Clock & Sign® isn’t being removed or changing to a digital clock — it’s undergoing a restoration and preservation project. The sign at the corner of Pike Street and Pike Place (and the backdrop to billions of Market photos) will be covered for the next five weeks as local contractor NOVO makes our sign sparkle like never before. Starting Monday, May 9th, our Public Market Center Clock & Sign® will be covered and not visible to the public. Preserving a 114-year public market is a lot of work, and we are happy to partner with Seattle-based NOVO on this memorable project. Restoring the Public Market Center Clock & Sign® is not a simple project. The restoration and preservation of our famous Public Market Center Clock & Sign is finished.
